title: Waymo Nears 500,000 Rides Per Week Across 10 U.S. Cities
subtitle: Co-CEO Dmitri Dolgov confirms 3,000-vehicle fleet driving 4 million fully autonomous miles per week, targeting 1 million paid rides weekly.
content_html:
Alphabet's Waymo is completing roughly 500,000 fully autonomous rides per week across 10 U.S. cities, co-CEO Dmitri Dolgov confirmed on March 24, 2026, in a conversation with Stripe co-founder John Collison.

Waymo Scale in 2026

The 3,000-vehicle fleet drives more than 4 million fully autonomous miles per week. Waymo is targeting one million paid rides per week as it expands into new cities including Atlanta, Miami, and Washington D.C.

No Human Safety Drivers

All rides counted are fully driverless. Waymo does not count supervised or hybrid-mode rides in its weekly totals, making the 500,000 figure a clean autonomous benchmark.
